summary: OFFLINE MODE TEST PASSED - Construcciones and Mejoras successfully load from IndexedDB cache when browser is in offline mode. Verified: 1) Project data cached in IndexedDB, 2) Predios loaded (3234), 3) Geometrías loaded (6076), 4) Construcciones loaded from cache (6912), 5) Mejoras counter displays correctly (1969). The 'Modo offline' banner and 'Offline Ready' indicators work as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: VisorActualizacion.js lines 718-729 - getConstruccionesOffline() successfully loads 6912 construcciones in offline mode
VERIFIED: offlineDB.js getConstruccionesOffline() function (line 582) retrieves cached GeoJSON correctly
VERIFIED: Offline mode banner 'Modo offline - Solo datos previamente descargados' displays correctly
VERIFIED: Predios load from offline: 3234 with correct deduplication
VERIFIED: Mejoras counter displays 1969 in both online and offline mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline functionality is fully working. Data caches correctly in IndexedDB and loads when browser goes offline. The visor URL is /dashboard/visor-actualizacion/:proyectoId (not /actualizacion/...). Project ID for Sardinata: 32ba040f-ed50-45e2-a115-22ab3a351423

indexeddb_caching.details: IndexedDB stores correctly populated: predios=3234, geometrias=6076, construcciones=6912

offline_predios_loading.details: Console: [Offline] Predios R1/R2 cargados desde offline: 3234

offline_construcciones_loading.details: Console: [OfflineDB] Construcciones cargadas del caché: 6912, [Visor] Procesando 6912 construcciones

offline_mejoras_counter.details: Mejoras counter shows 1969 in both online and offline mode

offline_mode_indicators.details: Yellow banner 'Modo offline - Solo datos previamente descargados', 'Offline Ready' button, orange no-wifi icon all visible

map_rendering_offline.details: Map renders with geometries (green polygons=predios, blue/purple=construcciones) in offline mode

console_log_evidence: [Cache] Predios indexados: todos=3234, pendiente=3220, visitado=10, actualizado=4, mejoras=233

.screenshots/02_offline.jpg - Shows offline mode with all data preserved
test_method: Playwright browser automation with page.context.set_offline(True) to simulate offline mode
